title: FDA grants breakthrough device designation to cortical BCI implant
summary: A cortical interface program received a regulatory designation that could compress review timelines if clinical evidence remains supportive.

title: Endovascular BCI study expands enrollment across additional centers
summary: An endovascular neural interface trial added new study sites, suggesting operational progress toward a larger pivotal data package.

title: High-density cortical recordings improve speech decoding performance
summary: Recent academic work indicates that denser cortical recordings and transformer-based decoders may improve speech restoration use cases.
